category_sources: source_facts.description says PC Engine emulator; official GitHub README calls HuExpress a CoreGrafx / PC Engine / TurboGrafx-16 emulator.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses HuExpress; source_facts.name provides the package spelling huexpress.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains usage and configuration details; repository has an official doc directory for format documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/kallisti5/huexpress, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a PC Engine emulator; official README names CoreGrafx, PC Engine, and TurboGrafx-16 emulation and command-line usage.
